inputs.description: GitHub fine-grained PAT for local MCP access. Prefer OAuth remote MCP when available.
Hugging Face token with the minimum scopes required by the reviewed MCP server.
Path to the reviewed Gmail OAuth client secret file on the developer machine.

env.MCP_SECURITY_NOTE: Replace reviewed-huggingface-mcp-server with an approved package or customer-owned wrapper after source and dependency review. Candidate community projects include evalstate/mcp-hfspace and shreyaskarnik/huggingface-mcp-server.

Replace reviewed-gmail-mcp-server with an approved package or customer-owned Google Workspace Gmail API wrapper after OAuth scope and source review. Candidate community project: vladmsv/mcp-server-gmail.
